zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabell Stanley於1411年出生在英國英格蘭爾艾勒斯莫 波特時，她的父親Sir William de Stanley IV43歲，母親Margery de Hooton48歲。她與Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1481年在英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓享年70歲，埋葬在英國爾普雷斯特波利。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Isabell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabell Stanley was born in 1411, in Ellesmere Port, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William de Stanley IV, was 43 and her mother, Margery de Hooton, was 48. She married Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 10 daughters. She died in 1481, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabell Stanley est née en 1411, à Ellesmere Port, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Stanley IV, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margery de Hooton, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée en 1481, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.Houghton Manor, West Houghton, Nr Ellesm: Ellesmere Port, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabell Stanley 1411 in Ellesmere Port, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Stanley IV 43 und ihre Mutter Margery de Hooton 48. Sie hat Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb 1481 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Prestbury, Cheshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabell Stanleyが1411年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエレスメア ポルトで生まれた時，父Sir William de Stanley IVは43歳，母Margery de Hootonは48歳であった。Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1481年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで70歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabell Stanley(이)가 1411년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 엘레스머 포트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Stanley IV(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Hooton(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1481년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애들링턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 플레스트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabell Stanley nasceu em 1411, em Ellesmere Port, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William de Stanley IV, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Hooton, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 10 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1481, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Houghton Manor, West Houghton, Nr Ellesm: Ellesmere Port, Cheshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabell Stanley родилась в 1411 г. в местности эллесмир порт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William de Stanley IV было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margery de Hooton, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Она умерла в 1481 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности престбури, чешир, Англия.

Se casó con Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió en 1481, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
